PreToolUse.description: stroi: deterministically block catastrophic shell commands (rm -rf /, force push, DROP TABLE, ...)

PostToolUse.description: stroi: record touched file paths so tspec staleness can be detected

SessionStart.description: stroi: flag scopes whose tspec.md is older than code changed under it (silent when clean)

PreCompact.description: stroi: snapshot a resume pointer for an in-progress plan-big run before compaction
